india_trends.title: Mukesh, Kishore, Rafi, Lata, Asha... the golden greats are gone, their songs play on
india_trends.summary: The passing of Asha Bhosle at the age of 92 marks the end of an era for Indian music. She was part of an iconic group alongside Lata Mangeshkar, Mohammed Rafi, Kishore Kumar and Mukesh, creating an unparalleled legacy. Their enchanting melodies still resonate deeply with fans today.

india_trends.title: India's commercial vehicle volumes to hit 12.4 lakh units in FY27 surpassing previous peak: Crisil
india_trends.summary: India's commercial vehicle sector is set for a record year in fiscal 2027, reaching 12.4 lakh units. Growth is expected to settle at 5-6 percent following a robust rebound. india_trends.title: IDFC First Bank Q4 Results: PAT grows 5% YoY to Rs 319 crore; NIM drops 2 bps to 5.93%
india_trends.summary: IDFC First Bank Q4 Results: The private lender's net interest margins (NIMs) saw a 2 bps year-on-year decline to 5.93% in Q4FY26 versus 5.95% in the year ago period.

india_trends.title: Dalal Street Week Ahead: Nifty’s next big move hinges on support test; volatility set to stay high
india_trends.summary: The Nifty ended the week under pressure, slipping into a corrective phase as volatility surged. With the index hovering near crucial support at 23,800, any breach could trigger deeper weakness. Traders should remain cautious, focus on capital protection, and prepare for a volatile, range-bound marke

india_trends.summary: RBL Bank reported a significant three-fold surge in net profit for the fourth quarter, reaching Rs 230 crore, driven by robust business expansion and improved asset quality. The bank's net advances grew 23% year-on-year, with retail segment contributing substantially. Despite a dip in net interest m

india_trends.title: Reliance Industries becomes first Indian firm to cross $10 billion annual profit
india_trends.summary: Reliance Industries achieved a record net profit of Rs 95,610 crore in FY26, becoming the first Indian company to surpass $10 billion in annual profit. india_trends.title: Stay cautious, focus on selective buying, says Nischal Maheshwari amid market volatility
india_trends.summary: Market veteran Nischal Maheshwari urges investors to stay on the sidelines. He advises against aggressive positions due to current market volatility. Maheshwari favors structural themes like power and solar. He also sees potential in metals and banking. However, he suggests avoiding IT and auto stoc

india_trends.title: Delhi Airport to boost international capacity by 50% as T3 Pier C goes global in May
india_trends.summary: Delhi's Indira Gandhi International Airport is set to significantly increase its international flight capacity. Pier C at Terminal 3 will start handling international passengers from early May. This expansion will boost the airport's annual capacity by nearly 50%.

india_trends.title: L&T Finance Q4 profit climbs 27 pc to Rs 807 cr
india_trends.summary: L&T Finance announced a significant 27 percent jump in its March quarter profit after tax, reaching Rs 807 crore. This growth was fueled by a sharp increase in interest income and robust retail loan disbursements. The company's core net interest also saw an upward trend.

india_trends.title: Smallcaps back in favour as valuations turn attractive: Siddharth Vora
india_trends.summary: Siddharth Vora has turned constructive on the market, seeing attractive valuations after a recent correction, and is increasing exposure to smallcaps. His portfolio remains overweight in metals, power, and materials, while avoiding IT. He sees contrarian opportunities in oil marketing companies afte

india_trends.title: Belgian insurer Ageas eyes India growth, explores acquisitions for expansion
india_trends.summary: Belgium's Ageas Group is prioritizing India's growth, aiming to break into the top 10 insurers in both life and non-life segments. The company is exploring acquisition opportunities and deepening its commitment to the market, building on previous strategic moves.
